Tip of the day
Hunting activities that require inputs give twice the rolls of their main loot table!

Silver star pearl ring
(Eternal)
Quality:
Type: Crafted
Slot: Ring
Value: 294

Bankable:     Droppable:
Sellable:     Tradable:

A silver ring set with a polished star pearl, when the light hits it, it shows its soft beauty.

The Silver star pearl ring item is a crafted item.

Requirements

This item has no requirements to use it.

Attributes

Quality Attributes

Global +1% Fine material finding
+4% Find gems While doing Mining.

Global +2% Fine material finding
+5% Find gems While doing Mining.

Global +3% Fine material finding
+6% Find gems While doing Mining.

Global +4% Fine material finding
+7% Find gems While doing Mining.

Global +5% Fine material finding
+8% Find gems While doing Mining.

Global +6% Fine material finding
+10% Find gems While doing Mining.

Uses

Job Boards

Silver star pearl ring can be requested from the following job:

Job Board Name Location Quantity Item Type Rewards
Blackspell Port job board Blackspell Port 4 +2  Erdwise Faction Reputation
1x   Trinketry chest
Blackspell Port job board Blackspell Port 2 +2  Erdwise Faction Reputation
1x   Chest of Erdwise

Sources

Primary Recipe Output

Create a silver star pearl ring

You carefully nestle the star pearl into its silver setting. The soft radiance adding an refined touch to the polished band.

Set a luminous star pearl into a silver ring.

Recipe Outputs
Recipe Name Level Service
Requirement 		Materials
Used 		Recipe
Outputs
Create a silver star pearl ring Trinketry lvl. 17 Needs Basic Trinketry Bench service or better. 1x Star pearl
1x Silver bar		 1x Silver star pearl ring

XP 		Base
Steps 		Base

Rate 		W.E.A.R.
